title: Anobis

{{Quote|Anobis? This place is the back end of nowhere.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''</ref>}}
'''Anobis''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located into the [[Anobis system/Legends|Anobis system]] of the [[Bright Jewel sector/Legends|Bright Jewel sector]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] Territories. It was located near [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] and was primarily known as an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] and a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony, providing major [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuffs]] to the nearby and more distant [[Star system/Legends|star systems]].

==Characteristics==
Anobis was an agricultural and mining colony world, never heavily populated save for sparse collections of colonists in rural mining and farming villages.<ref name="YJK" /> Relatively obscure, the world was war-torn, with populated regions bearing numerous scars and craters due to its long history of civil war.<ref name="YJK" />

The planet possessed trees with dense branches and blue-silver leaves, some with smooth metallic trunks that were known to foul [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]], and others blistered with scaly orange-red bark.<ref name="YJK" /> In addition to the carnivorous [[Knaar]] that roamed the planet, Anobis also had small flying creatures, resembling a cross between a bird and a moth.<ref name="YJK" />

Throughout much of its history, much of Anobis' terrain was rigged with traps as the colonists waged war on each other.<ref name="YJK" /> The forests were rigged with [[Holographic disguise matrix|holographically disguised]] pit traps filled with [[durasteel]] spikes, near invisible [[monofilament wire]] traps set between trees, motion activated [[Autoturret/Legends|autoturrets]], concealed [[Land mine/Legends|land mines]], and disguised [[Pressure Plate Trip|pressure plates]] hooked up to simple branch and root traps.<ref name="YJK" /> The fields and plains of Anobis were riddled with [[burrowing detonator]]s, numbering in the hundreds for a single field,<ref name="YJK" /> while the mountain mines were trapped with motion and sound sensitive [[Sonic grenade/Legends|sonic detonators]].<ref name="YJK" />

Weapons were in high demand on Anobis, and [[Smuggler]]s and gunrunners alike traded with Anobis heavily, supplying [[blaster]]s, [[burrowing detonator]]s, [[Sonic grenade/Legends|sonic grenades]], and more to the embattled planet.<ref name="YJK" /> The nearby [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] benefited especially, establishing a lucrative arms running operation.

==History==
Colonized by [[Human/Legends|Human]] settlers sometime after [[3000 BBY]] and before the [[Ruusan Reformations/Legends|Ruusan Reformation]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the colonists set up mining and agricultural operations in different regions across the world, with two distinct communities forming as a result.<ref name="YJK" />

Initially self-sustaining, the farming and mining communities initially co-existed by trading with each other.<ref name="YJK" /> However, by the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], the miners depended heavily on trade with the larger galaxy in order to survive, trading valuable ore and crystals with off world traders - primarily the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] - whenever possible.<ref name="YJK" /> The farmers in the lowland plains, however, were largely self-sufficient, and largely supported the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance]] and their bid to overthrow Imperial rule. The schism that ensued sparked an intense civil war.<ref name="YJK" /> During the conflict, weapons were [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggled]] to Anobis from neighboring [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]].<ref name="db">{{DB|location|ordmantell|Ord Mantell}}</ref><ref name="SWG:DMDtW">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other}}Journal Entry: "Dynath Miners: Deliver the Warning"</ref>

The civil war raged past the dissolution of the Empire and the formation of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], for a period of about twenty five years until [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]] when [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] met with the leaders of both groups and coordinated a tentative cease-fire.<ref name="YJK" />
